attacking_style: Does not initiate attacks; relies on positioning for reduced-bunch sprints after selective racing. Thrives when climbs or accelerations eliminate pure sprinters before final 1-2km.
team_tactics: Team provides solid positioning into final kilometers but appears less dominant than top sprint trains. Struggles when disrupted by crashes or organizational issues mid-stage.
terrain_preference: Punchy, selective circuits that reduce bunch size but not steep enough to drop him. Vulnerable on repeated acceleration circuits where Quick-Step-style tempo sheds his positioning.
vulnerability: Lacks explosive finishing punch in pure flat sprints against top-tier fast finishers. Exposed when aggressive teams (Quick-Step) accelerate repeatedly on punchy terrain, loses positioning in chaotic/tangled sprint approaches.
key_patterns: Positioned excellently but cannot convert against faster finishers in final 200m (3 instances)
Survives selective racing that drops pure sprinters, wins from reduced groups (2 instances)
Loses contact when Quick-Step or similar teams accelerate repeatedly on punchy circuits (2 instances)
Team disruptions or positioning tangles cost sprint opportunities despite good leadout work (2 instances)
form_trajectory: negative: 2022 data shows perfect positioning but inability to convert, suggesting power decline despite tactical intelligence remaining intact
